name: APK Cloud Launchpad
description: Flask portal for a VPS or remote APK builder.
keywords.description: One-click Heroku Flask portal for a VPS or remote APK builder.

REMOTE_BUILDER_BASE_URL.description: Public HTTPS API URL of your running VPS/remote APK builder service.

MONGODB_URL.description: MongoDB connection string used for user registration, login, and session storage.

REMOTE_BUILDER_TOKEN.description: Optional but recommended. Must match BUILDER_SHARED_SECRET from the builder VPS if builder auth is enabled.
